ast: min(1)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                             |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                      |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: UInt8([1, 1]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: min(NULL)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+-----------------------------+
| Column | Data                        |
+--------+-----------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1])) |
| Output | Null { len: 2 }             |
+--------+-----------------------------+


ast: min(const_int)
evaluation (internal):

| Column    | Data                                                             |

| Output    | NullableColumn { column: Int32([5, 5]), validity: [0b______11] } |
